bead.title: init: stop project-local default plugin installation in plain ddx init
bead.description:
PROBLEM
Plain `ddx init` eagerly installs the default `ddx` plugin into every project. The intended model is that project init only creates `<project>/.ddx/` and the project manifest; plugins should lazy-resolve from the global layer on first use.

ROOT CAUSE
- cli/cmd/init.go:73 `runInit` currently routes plain init through eager plugin setup.
- cli/cmd/init.go:271-284 calls `registry.InstallPackageFromFS(pkg, defaultplugin.FS(), workingDir)` unconditionally, producing `.ddx/plugins/ddx`, `.agents/skills/ddx`, and `.claude/skills/ddx` in the project.

PROPOSED FIX
1. Remove the default plugin install from the no-flag `ddx init` path.
2. Keep project-local initialization of `<project>/.ddx/` and the manifest intact.
3. Ensure the no-flag path does not create or modify any project `plugins/` tree or agent-tier skill links.
4. Leave actual plugin lookup to `registry.ResolvePlugin`, preferring project over global, from the sibling registry-resolver bead.

NON-SCOPE
- The resolver precedence itself (sibling bead: registry two-layer resolution).
- install/update `--global` wiring (sibling bead).
- `ddx doctor` reporting and spec/doc updates (sibling bead: doctor + specs).
- Migrating any `~/.config/ddx/` legacy paths.

DEPS
- ddx-06cbaa90 (ddx home resolution).
- sibling registry-resolver bead.

PARENT
- ddx-937de9fc.
bead.acceptance:
1. `TestInitProject_DoesNotInstallPlugins` verifies that `ddx init` with no flag creates `<project>/.ddx/` and the manifest but does not write `.ddx/plugins/ddx`, `.agents/skills/ddx`, `.claude/skills/ddx`, or any project-local `plugins/` tree.
2. `TestInitProject_LeavesPluginsForLazyResolution` verifies the initialized project can lazy-resolve the default `ddx` plugin from the global layer through `registry.ResolvePlugin` when the sibling resolver behavior is present.
3. `cd cli && go test ./cmd/... -run 'TestInitProject_DoesNotInstallPlugins|TestInitProject_LeavesPluginsForLazyResolution'` passes.
4. `cd cli && go test ./cmd/...` passes.
5. `lefthook run pre-commit` passes.
